description_long: This object is a large, broad-bladed sword with a distinctive geometric blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is matte black and appears to be made of metal, with a wide, flat surface and angular edges. The hilt features a circular guard with intersecting metal bars, giving it a unique and somewhat ornamental appearance. The handle is cylindrical, black, and capped with a rounded pommel, possibly wrapped for grip. Subtle bronze or gold accents are visible on the guard, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise dark color scheme. The overall design suggests a weapon intended for both display and practical use, with a robust and imposing presence.
description: A large, matte black sword with a broad, angular blade and a circular, metal crossguard accented in bronze. The handle is cylindrical and capped with a rounded pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the broad, angular blade and the circular crossguard with intersecting bars.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle, with the circular guard visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the blade's width and the structure of the guard and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the profile of the guard and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, black, possibly wrapped, rounded pommel
